title: Docs floor for architecture-class cycles: a deliverable that adds a policy key, new package, new phase, or new exported architecture surface MUST ship its documentation delta in the same diff — enforced, not aspirational
why: OPERATOR QUESTION 2026-07-21 exposed the gap with live evidence: the prefix-queue landing system (cycles 981/982 — new fleet.landing policy mode, single-writer composer, NNFI culprit resolution) landed with ZERO docs/ files; 'fleet.landing' appears nowhere in docs/ (runtime-reference, control-flags, no ADR). Cycles enforce godoc-on-exports (apicover) and write dossiers, but narrative design docs exist only when an operator session hand-writes them (ADR-0073). The operator standing rules always_full_documentation + doc_stewardship_policy bind sessions, not cycles — architecture rationale is leaking into run artifacts that nobody reads later.
how_to_apply: Deterministic trigger, config-first (no LLM judgment needed to DETECT, only to WRITE): (1) classify a build diff as architecture-class when it adds any of — a policy/config key (internal/policy struct tag or policy.json vocabulary), a new internal package, a new phase spec, or a new exported type/func in a trust-kernel package (guards/core/ship/fleet); (2) architecture-class => the deliverable contract (internal/deliverable, ADR-0034 seam) requires a docs delta in the SAME diff: an ADR or design-doc under docs/architecture/ PLUS the operational surface updates (docs/architecture/control-flags.md for new flags/keys, docs/operations/runtime-reference.md for operator-visible behavior); (3) the audit checklist gains the same check so the auditor names the missing doc explicitly; (4) builder persona/prompt gains the instruction so docs are written DURING build, not retrofitted; (5) fail-open only for non-architecture diffs — pure bugfix/test/docs cycles unaffected. Wiring proof: a synthetic arch-class diff without a docs delta must be rejected at the deliverable gate in the composed path. Backfill AC: document fleet.landing (the 981/982 residue) as the first enforced instance.
evidence: git show --stat c11f30a7 1325b94d => 0 docs/ files; grep -rn 'fleet.landing|prefix-queue|LandPrefixes' docs/ => no matches; deliverable contract gate exists (internal/deliverable ADR-0034) as the natural seam; apicover godoc DoD covers API comments only, not design rationale.
